instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.

output: {"workflow_name": "Monthly Payroll Run", "category": "payroll", "trigger": {"event": "The monthly pay period closes", "source_system": "SAP"}, "systems": ["SAP", "Concur", "Microsoft 365"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Aggregate timesheets and approved expenses", "system": "SAP", "required_inputs": ["pay_period", "employee_ids"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Flag missing timesheets to managers"}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Calculate gross pay, taxes, and deductions", "system": "SAP", "required_inputs": ["pay_period", "tax_tables"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Reconcile totals against the finance ledger", "system": "Concur", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id", "gl_account"], "condition": "Block disbursement if variance exceeds threshold", "fallback": "Hold the run and notify finance"}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Disburse payments and send payslips", "system": "SAP", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id", "bank_file"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 5, "action": "Notify finance that the run is complete", "system": "Microsoft 365", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}], "approval_required": true, "risk_level": "high"}

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.

output: {"workflow_name": "Semi-Monthly Payroll Run", "category": "payroll", "trigger": {"event": "The semi-monthly pay period closes", "source_system": "Workday"}, "systems": ["Workday", "SAP", "Microsoft 365"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Aggregate timesheets and approved expenses", "system": "Workday", "required_inputs": ["pay_period", "employee_ids"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Flag missing timesheets to managers"}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Calculate gross pay, taxes, and deductions", "system": "Workday", "required_inputs": ["pay_period", "tax_tables"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Reconcile totals against the finance ledger", "system": "SAP", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id", "gl_account"], "condition": "Block disbursement if variance exceeds threshold", "fallback": "Hold the run and notify finance"}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Disburse payments and send payslips", "system": "Workday", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id", "bank_file"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 5, "action": "Notify finance that the run is complete", "system": "Microsoft 365", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}], "approval_required": true, "risk_level": "high"}

output: {"workflow_name": "Password Reset Ticket Handling", "category": "ticketing", "trigger": {"event": "A password reset ticket is submitted", "source_system": "Zendesk"}, "systems": ["Zendesk", "Slack"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Intake and classify the ticket", "system": "Zendesk", "required_inputs": ["reporter_id", "description", "category"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Triage priority and assign an owner", "system": "Zendesk", "required_inputs": ["ticket_id", "severity"], "condition": "Escalate to on-call if severity is critical", "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Resolve the issue and document the fix", "system": "Zendesk", "required_inputs": ["ticket_id", "resolution_notes"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Reassign if owner is unavailable past SLA"}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Notify the reporter and close the ticket", "system": "Slack", "required_inputs": ["ticket_id", "reporter_id"], "condition": "Only after the reporter confirms resolution", "fallback": null}], "approval_required": false, "risk_level": "low"}

output: {"workflow_name": "Password Reset Ticket Handling", "category": "ticketing", "trigger": {"event": "A password reset ticket is submitted", "source_system": "Zendesk"}, "systems": ["Zendesk", "Microsoft 365"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Intake and classify the ticket", "system": "Zendesk", "required_inputs": ["reporter_id", "description", "category"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Triage priority and assign an owner", "system": "Zendesk", "required_inputs": ["ticket_id", "severity"], "condition": "Escalate to on-call if severity is critical", "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Resolve the issue and document the fix", "system": "Zendesk", "required_inputs": ["ticket_id", "resolution_notes"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Reassign if owner is unavailable past SLA"}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Notify the reporter and close the ticket", "system": "Microsoft 365", "required_inputs": ["ticket_id", "reporter_id"], "condition": "Only after the reporter confirms resolution", "fallback": null}], "approval_required": false, "risk_level": "low"}

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.
input: our 200-person startup needs a bi-weekly payroll workflow for the US entity: timesheet aggregation, pay calculation, ledger reconciliation in SAP, disbursement of over 1,200 payments, and a completion notice.
output: {"workflow_name": "Bi-Weekly Payroll Run", "category": "payroll", "trigger": {"event": "The bi-weekly pay period closes", "source_system": "Workday"}, "systems": ["Workday", "SAP", "Microsoft 365"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Aggregate timesheets and approved expenses", "system": "Workday", "required_inputs": ["pay_period", "employee_ids"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Flag missing timesheets to managers"}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Calculate gross pay, taxes, and deductions", "system": "Workday", "required_inputs": ["pay_period", "tax_tables"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Reconcile totals against the finance ledger", "system": "SAP", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id", "gl_account"], "condition": "Block disbursement if variance exceeds threshold", "fallback": "Hold the run and notify finance"}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Disburse payments and send payslips", "system": "Workday", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id", "bank_file"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 5, "action": "Notify finance that the run is complete", "system": "Microsoft 365", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}], "approval_required": true, "risk_level": "high"}

output: {"workflow_name": "Semi-Monthly Payroll Run", "category": "payroll", "trigger": {"event": "The semi-monthly pay period closes", "source_system": "Workday"}, "systems": ["Workday", "Concur", "Slack"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Aggregate timesheets and approved expenses", "system": "Workday", "required_inputs": ["pay_period", "employee_ids"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Flag missing timesheets to managers"}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Calculate gross pay, taxes, and deductions", "system": "Workday", "required_inputs": ["pay_period", "tax_tables"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Reconcile totals against the finance ledger", "system": "Concur", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id", "gl_account"], "condition": "Block disbursement if variance exceeds threshold", "fallback": "Hold the run and notify finance"}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Disburse payments and send payslips", "system": "Workday", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id", "bank_file"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 5, "action": "Notify finance that the run is complete", "system": "Slack", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}], "approval_required": true, "risk_level": "high"}

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.
input: At our SaaS company, when a software bug comes in via the support portal for the Marketing team on Jira: intake and classify it, triage priority, resolve it, and confirm with the reporter on Microsoft 365 before closing.
output: {"workflow_name": "Software Bug Ticket Handling", "category": "ticketing", "trigger": {"event": "A software bug ticket is submitted", "source_system": "Jira"}, "systems": ["Jira", "Microsoft 365"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Intake and classify the ticket", "system": "Jira", "required_inputs": ["reporter_id", "description", "category"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Triage priority and assign an owner", "system": "Jira", "required_inputs": ["ticket_id", "severity"], "condition": "Escalate to on-call if severity is critical", "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Resolve the issue and document the fix", "system": "Jira", "required_inputs": ["ticket_id", "resolution_notes"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Reassign if owner is unavailable past SLA"}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Notify the reporter and close the ticket", "system": "Microsoft 365", "required_inputs": ["ticket_id", "reporter_id"], "condition": "Only after the reporter confirms resolution", "fallback": null}], "approval_required": false, "risk_level": "low"}

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.

output: {"workflow_name": "Semi-Monthly Payroll Run", "category": "payroll", "trigger": {"event": "The semi-monthly pay period closes", "source_system": "Workday"}, "systems": ["Workday", "Concur", "Slack"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Aggregate timesheets and approved expenses", "system": "Workday", "required_inputs": ["pay_period", "employee_ids"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Flag missing timesheets to managers"}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Calculate gross pay, taxes, and deductions", "system": "Workday", "required_inputs": ["pay_period", "tax_tables"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Reconcile totals against the finance ledger", "system": "Concur", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id", "gl_account"], "condition": "Block disbursement if variance exceeds threshold", "fallback": "Hold the run and notify finance"}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Disburse payments and send payslips", "system": "Workday", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id", "bank_file"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 5, "action": "Notify finance that the run is complete", "system": "Slack", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}], "approval_required": true, "risk_level": "high"}

output: {"workflow_name": "Paid Time Off Request", "category": "leave_management", "trigger": {"event": "A HR business partner requests paid time off", "source_system": "ADP"}, "systems": ["ADP", "Google Workspace"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Submit paid time off request for review", "system": "ADP", "required_inputs": ["employee_id", "start_date", "end_date"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Route request to direct manager for approval", "system": "ADP", "required_inputs": ["request_id", "manager_id"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Auto-escalate to skip-level after 3 business days"}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Notify payroll and update leave balance", "system": "ADP", "required_inputs": ["request_id", "approved_days"], "condition": "Only after manager approval", "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Inform the team of coverage dates", "system": "Google Workspace", "required_inputs": ["team", "start_date", "end_date"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}], "approval_required": true, "risk_level": "medium"}

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.
input: At a healthcare provider we run bi-weekly payroll for Canada (a few thousand employees) on Workday: pull timesheets and expenses, compute pay and deductions, reconcile against the ledger in SAP, pay everyone, and send payslips.
output: {"workflow_name": "Bi-Weekly Payroll Run", "category": "payroll", "trigger": {"event": "The bi-weekly pay period closes", "source_system": "Workday"}, "systems": ["Workday", "SAP", "Microsoft 365"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Aggregate timesheets and approved expenses", "system": "Workday", "required_inputs": ["pay_period", "employee_ids"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Flag missing timesheets to managers"}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Calculate gross pay, taxes, and deductions", "system": "Workday", "required_inputs": ["pay_period", "tax_tables"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Reconcile totals against the finance ledger", "system": "SAP", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id", "gl_account"], "condition": "Block disbursement if variance exceeds threshold", "fallback": "Hold the run and notify finance"}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Disburse payments and send payslips", "system": "Workday", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id", "bank_file"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 5, "action": "Notify finance that the run is complete", "system": "Microsoft 365", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}], "approval_required": true, "risk_level": "high"}

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.
input: At a mid-size fintech, when a network outage comes in via a Slack command for the IT team on Jira: intake and classify it, triage priority, resolve it, and confirm with the reporter on Microsoft 365 before closing.

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.
input: At our regional bank we run monthly payroll for APAC (a few thousand employees) on ADP: pull timesheets and expenses, compute pay and deductions, reconcile against the ledger in SAP, pay everyone, and send payslips.
output: {"workflow_name": "Monthly Payroll Run", "category": "payroll", "trigger": {"event": "The monthly pay period closes", "source_system": "ADP"}, "systems": ["ADP", "SAP", "Google Workspace"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Aggregate timesheets and approved expenses", "system": "ADP", "required_inputs": ["pay_period", "employee_ids"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Flag missing timesheets to managers"}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Calculate gross pay, taxes, and deductions", "system": "ADP", "required_inputs": ["pay_period", "tax_tables"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Reconcile totals against the finance ledger", "system": "SAP", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id", "gl_account"], "condition": "Block disbursement if variance exceeds threshold", "fallback": "Hold the run and notify finance"}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Disburse payments and send payslips", "system": "ADP", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id", "bank_file"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 5, "action": "Notify finance that the run is complete", "system": "Google Workspace", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}], "approval_required": true, "risk_level": "high"}

output: {"workflow_name": "Marketing Specialist Onboarding", "category": "hr_onboarding", "trigger": {"event": "A new marketing specialist is hired in Marketing", "source_system": "ADP"}, "systems": ["ADP", "Okta", "Slack", "Workday"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Collect and verify signed onboarding documents", "system": "Workday", "required_inputs": ["employee_id", "offer_letter"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Escalate to HR if documents are missing"}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Create employee profile and assign manager", "system": "ADP", "required_inputs": ["employee_id", "department"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Provision SSO account and email", "system": "Okta", "required_inputs": ["employee_email", "role"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Open IT ticket if provisioning fails"}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Add new hire to team channels and groups", "system": "Slack", "required_inputs": ["employee_email", "team"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}], "approval_required": false, "risk_level": "medium"}

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.
input: Process bereavement leave for a financial analyst (15 days). Capture the request, get manager sign-off, update payroll, and announce coverage to the team.
output: {"workflow_name": "Bereavement Leave Request", "category": "leave_management", "trigger": {"event": "A financial analyst requests bereavement leave", "source_system": "Workday"}, "systems": ["Workday", "Slack"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Submit bereavement leave request for review", "system": "Workday", "required_inputs": ["employee_id", "start_date", "end_date"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Route request to direct manager for approval", "system": "Workday", "required_inputs": ["request_id", "manager_id"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Auto-escalate to skip-level after 3 business days"}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Notify payroll and update leave balance", "system": "Workday", "required_inputs": ["request_id", "approved_days"], "condition": "Only after manager approval", "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Inform the team of coverage dates", "system": "Slack", "required_inputs": ["team", "start_date", "end_date"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}], "approval_required": true, "risk_level": "high"}

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.
input: Run a GDPR control review at our manufacturing firm this mid-year, focused on the change-management controls, from kickoff through evidence gathering, gap remediation, and attestation.
output: {"workflow_name": "GDPR Control Review", "category": "compliance", "trigger": {"event": "The GDPR review cycle begins", "source_system": "Jira"}, "systems": ["Jira", "DocuSign"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Open the periodic GDPR review", "system": "Jira", "required_inputs": ["control_set", "review_period"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Collect evidence from control owners", "system": "Jira", "required_inputs": ["control_ids", "owner_ids"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Send reminders and escalate overdue items"}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Review evidence and flag gaps", "system": "Jira", "required_inputs": ["evidence_ids"], "condition": "Create remediation tasks for any failing control", "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Archive the signed attestation", "system": "DocuSign", "required_inputs": ["report_id", "approver_id"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}], "approval_required": true, "risk_level": "high"}

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.
input: Offboard a departing registered nurse (involuntary): record the termination, revoke access, reclaim assets, and settle final pay.
output: {"workflow_name": "Registered Nurse Offboarding", "category": "offboarding", "trigger": {"event": "A registered nurse is terminated or resigns", "source_system": "BambooHR"}, "systems": ["BambooHR", "Active Directory", "Jira"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Record the termination and last working day", "system": "BambooHR", "required_inputs": ["employee_id", "last_day", "reason"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Revoke all system access and SSO", "system": "Active Directory", "required_inputs": ["employee_id"], "condition": "Immediately on last day", "fallback": "Page security if revocation fails"}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Reclaim assets and close out tickets", "system": "Jira", "required_inputs": ["employee_id", "asset_list"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Run final payroll and benefits settlement", "system": "BambooHR", "required_inputs": ["employee_id", "final_pay"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}], "approval_required": true, "risk_level": "high"}

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.
input: Process the monthly payroll for LATAM covering about 50 staff. Aggregate hours and expenses in SAP, calculate net pay, check it against SAP, then disburse and distribute payslips.
output: {"workflow_name": "Monthly Payroll Run", "category": "payroll", "trigger": {"event": "The monthly pay period closes", "source_system": "SAP"}, "systems": ["SAP", "Slack"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Aggregate timesheets and approved expenses", "system": "SAP", "required_inputs": ["pay_period", "employee_ids"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Flag missing timesheets to managers"}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Calculate gross pay, taxes, and deductions", "system": "SAP", "required_inputs": ["pay_period", "tax_tables"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Reconcile totals against the finance ledger", "system": "SAP", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id", "gl_account"], "condition": "Block disbursement if variance exceeds threshold", "fallback": "Hold the run and notify finance"}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Disburse payments and send payslips", "system": "SAP", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id", "bank_file"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 5, "action": "Notify finance that the run is complete", "system": "Slack", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}], "approval_required": true, "risk_level": "high"}

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.
input: At our 200-person startup, when a password reset comes in via phone for the Marketing team on Zendesk: intake and classify it, triage priority, resolve it, and confirm with the reporter on Microsoft 365 before closing.
